_description: Configuration reference for 04 — User Interview Processor. Copy values to your .env file.

NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO.description: Email address to receive approval requests and processed artefacts

AI_MODEL_SMART.description: OpenAI model for artefact extraction. gpt-4o gives best quality; gpt-4o-mini is cheaper.

NOTIFICATION_CHANNEL.description: Where to send the final artefact: email | slack | telegram | all

SLACK_CHANNEL_RESEARCH.description: Slack channel ID for research team notifications

INTERVIEW_APPROVAL_TIMEOUT_HOURS.description: Hours before approval times out and artefact is discarded

INTERVIEW_MAX_TRANSCRIPT_CHARS.description: Maximum transcript characters sent to AI. Longer transcripts are truncated.

INTERVIEW_PII_REDACT.description: Set to true to run transcript through PII Redaction subworkflow before AI processing
